description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a semi-circular arrangement of tall, leafy trees. The exterior features a combination of white and natural wood paneling, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house has a small, white picket fence and a pair of neatly trimmed bushes flanking the entryway, which is accessed by a short set of steps. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper floor set back slightly, creating a small balcony or terrace area. The landscaping is simple but intentional, with the trees forming a protective barrier around the property. The overall aesthetic is clean, contemporary, and designed to blend harmoniously with its natural surroundings.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roof, wood and white paneling, large windows, and a semi-circular arrangement of tall trees. The entryway features a white picket fence, steps, and manicured bushes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entryway with white picket fence, steps, two bushes, and the main door, framed by a semi-circle of trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, wood paneling, and the dense tree coverage wrapping around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house mostly obscured by trees, showing the back wall and upper windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the balcony/terrace area, more windows, and the continuation of the tree barrier.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a white picket fence, short steps, two manicured bushes, and a simple modern door
